title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: January 2026 - Montréal
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: January 2026 - Montréal
Please register now for the first installment of our 2026 Tax Tour, an interactive and practical discussion of the evolving legislative and judicial tax landscape in Canada. Our speakers will address the following topics:
- New Year, Same MDR Rules: A Helpful Review With Examples Mike Dolson , Partner, National Tax Group
- Mike Dolson , Partner, National Tax Group
- Impact of New OECD Pillar Two Guidance on Canadian Entities and Tax Credits Stephanie Dewey , Partner, National Tax Group
- Stephanie Dewey , Partner, National Tax Group
- Selected 2025 Tax Disputes Highlights Dominic Bédard-Lapointe , Partner, National Tax Group
- Dominic Bédard-Lapointe , Partner, National Tax Group
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca . Mandatory continuing education for Québec CPAs: This program is equivalent to 1.5 hours of content. You can find more information on the continuing education requirements for Québec CPAs here . Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec . Note: This will take place in our Montréal office. A lunch to suit most dietary concerns will be served.
- Mike Dolson Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
